OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY PLTF FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEMOIL CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHEMOIL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. UNDER THE CLEAR AND UNAMBIGUOUS TERMS OF THE 2011 AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO A COMMISSION. FURTHER, THE COURT INDICATES THERE ARE DISPUTED ISSUES OF FACT REGARDING THE MEANING OF THE CONTRACT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: E. LARNAUTI; REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHEMOIL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Robert Charles Ward of Shartsis Friese LLP (421.6500) for plaintiff and responding party; Stephen H. Dye of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP (364.6713) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Defendant failed to shift the burden. Under the clear and unambiguous terms of the 2011 Agreement, Plaintiff was entitled to a commission. Further, the court indicates there are disputed issues of fact regarding the meaning of the contract. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: E. Larnauti; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
